nasb.text: Now Isaac sowed in that land and reaped in the same year a hundredfold. And the Lord blessed him,

esv.text: And Isaac sowed in that land and reaped in the same year a hundredfold. The Lord  blessed him,

cnv.text: 以撒在那裡耕種，那一年豐收百倍，耶和華實在賜福給他。

ccb.text: 以撒在那里耕种，耶和华赐福给他，那一年他得了百倍的收成。

csbs.text: 以撒在那地耕种，那一年收获百倍；耶和华祝福了他，
